reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 깃털류 좋아하는 고양인데 요즘 반응이 미지근해서 다른 종류로 리필 구매했어요. 사이즈들이 사진보다 좀 더 큰 느낌이고 우리집 고양이는 쪼매난 것들이 더 반응이 좋은 것 같아 개조(?)를 좀 해줘야겠어요. 그래도 역시 신상템은 좋아하네요ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My cat loves feather toys, but lately she's been losing interest, so I bought a refill with a different type. The sizes feel a bit bigger than in the pictures, and my cat seems to prefer the smaller ones, so I might need to do some adjustments lol. But yeah, she always loves new toys ㅎㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 집에있던 낚싯대에 깃털만 바꿔줬는데 크기가 커서그런지 훨씬 더 좋아하고 엄청 뛰며 놀았어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 지금 영상은 한참 뛰어놀다가 지쳤는지 누워서 손만 쓰네요 ㅋㅋ 다른건 아직 안달아줘봤는데 다 좋아할거같아요 ㅎ ㅎ가격도 저렴하고 추천합니당
reviews.content_en: I just swapped out the feathers on a fishing pole toy I had at home, and because the size is bigger, she loves it way more and plays jumping around like crazy ㅋㅋㅋ In the video now, she's been playing hard and got tired, so she's just lying there using only her paws ㅋㅋ I haven't attached the other attachments yet, but I think she'll love those too ㅎㅎ The price is cheap too and I highly recommend it!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 저희 애는 댕댕이지만 낚싯대에 환장해요🤣💕 다른거 몇 개 부숴먹고 아예 튼튼한 걸로 새로 샀습니다! 생각보다 길어서 당황했지만 저는 앉아서 휘두르기만 하니 뜻밖의 개이득👍 리필팩이랑 같이 사놔서 마음이 놓여요!! 낚싯대 보관통도 함께 주셔서 아주 좋습니당!
reviews.content_en: My pup is a dog but she's absolutely obsessed with the fishing pole toy🤣💕 She destroyed a few other toys, so I bought a new, really sturdy one! I was surprised by how long it is, but since I just sit and swing it, it's actually a great deal for me👍 I bought it together with a refill pack so I feel reassured!! You even included a storage case for the fishing pole, which is awesome!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 고냥이들이 재구매한(?) 전설의 리필팩 ㅋㅋㅋ 튼튼하고 좋아요! 3묘가 아주 신나게 잘놀고 뜯고 한참 즐기다가 이제 다시 새거 샀습니다!!
reviews.content_en: The legendary refill pack that the cats keep repurchasing lol ㅋㅋㅋ It's sturdy and great! My 3 cats play with it so excitedly and have a blast chewing and enjoying it, and now I've already bought new ones again!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 기대안하고 구매했는데 아이가 너무 좋아하네요:) 6개월 냥이예요~ㅋㅋ넘 좋아요 ..
reviews.content_en: I bought this without expecting much, but my kitten loves it so much :) She's 6 months old~ㅋㅋ I love it so much..

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
재구매 입니다. 말해모해 취저 제품 ㅋㅋ
튼튼하고 좋습니다!! 
봉지 소재(?) 같은 거 젤 좋아해요!!
reviews.content_en: This is a repurchase. Honestly, it's the best product lol ㅋㅋ It's sturdy and great!! I especially love the material of the pouch(?) !!

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 애들이 좋아해요 털이 빠지는 건 어쩔 수 없는데 갈색 털은 유독 많이 빠져요 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: The kids love it. Fur shedding is unavoidable, but the brown fur sheds a lot especially ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 마음에 드는 구성이에요 자꾸 놀자고 장난감 모아두는 걸이 앞에 앉아있어요
reviews.content_en: I like the composition. My pet keeps gathering toys wanting to play, and she's sitting in front of them

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 꼼꼼한 포장과 빠른 배송 감사합니다~
reviews.content_en: Thank you for the careful packaging and fast shipping~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 저희집 강쥐가 너무좋아해요
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이게 뭐라고 이래 좋아하누!!! 내구성이 약해서 자주 구매해야 되지민 그래도 우래기가 넘모 좋아하니까 또 산다
reviews.content_en: I can't believe how much they love this!!! The durability isn't the best so I have to buy it often, but my baby loves it so much that I keep getting more 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 받아보고 놀랏어요ㅎㅎ 퀄리티가 좋고 생각보다 커요ㅋㅋㅋ 울 고양이가 지루할때쯤 다른걸로 바꿔서 놀아줘야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I was surprised when I got it!! 😄 The quality is really good and it's bigger than I expected 😂😂 I think I'll need to switch to something else to entertain my cat when it gets bored

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
유후~ 울 아이가 엄청 좋아해요
특히 주황색 털뭉치요 요거만 따로 구매 하고 싶네요
reviews.content_en: Yay~ My little one absolutely loves it! 💕 Especially the orange fur ball - I'm thinking of buying just that one separately 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
가격도 저렴하고 애들도 실증을 잘 내는터라
큰 기대안하고 주문했는데
판매자분이 너무 친절하셔서
감동입니다
reviews.content_en: The price is affordable and the kids get bored easily anyway, so I ordered without expecting much, but the seller was so kind that I'm really touched 💛

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 새로운 장난감 사면 난리가 나요^^ 보라색 테일을 가장 좋아해서 없어졌네요ㅋㅋㅋ큰 깃털 장난감이 무게가 있어서 놀기가 약간 어려웠고 나머지는 잘 놀아요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Every time I get a new toy there's a big fuss 😄 They love the purple tail the most so it's already gone 😂😂 The big feather toy is a bit heavy so it's a little hard to play with, but they play with the rest just fine 😂

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 애들이 장남감을 너무 좋아하고 즐 질려서 새로 사봤어요
reviews.content_en: The kids love the toys so much and since they get bored quickly, I got a new set

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 반짝이는 별로 안좋아하고 나머지는 너무 조아해요 ^^
reviews.content_en: They're not really into the sparkly ones but they love everything else so much 😊

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 새거를 제일 좋아하는 아이들이라 리필용 자주 구매합니다. 반응이 좋아서 맘에 들어요
reviews.content_en: My kids love new things so I buy refills often. They react so well to these that I'm really happy with them 💕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 두가지 고루 고루 다 잘가지고 놀아요^^
reviews.content_en: They play well with both types 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 고양이가 환장해서 낚시 중
reviews.content_en: My cat is absolutely obsessed - fishing time! 🎣

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미선생님 제발 저 갈색 털만 따로 판매해 주세요. 인간적으로 털 많이 빠지긴 하는데 주인님이 저걸 넘 좋아해여ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: BITE ME teacher, please sell just that brown fur separately 😭 I know it sheds a lot, but my cat loves it so much 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 여기저기 잘 호환되어 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and it's compatible with lots of different things, which is great!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 좋아해용 낚시줄이 약한느낌이애요
reviews.content_en: I like it 😊 but the fishing line feels a bit weak

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 미친듯 잘 가지고 놀아요~
reviews.content_en: My cat plays with it like crazy~ 😆

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 장난감에 실증을 잘 느끼셔서ㅠㅠ 하나씩 사용해보는 중인데 나쁘지 않아요 오래는 안가지만 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My cat gets bored with toys easily 😭 so I'm trying them one at a time, and this one's not bad! Though it doesn't last super long 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
리필이 많았으면 좋겠어요.
반웅이 좋아서 좋았어요!
reviews.content_en: I wish there were more refills. Boonwoong loves it though, so that's great! 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 한번에 마련하니까 든든하네요! 잘쓰겠습니다
reviews.content_en: Having everything in one package is reassuring! Will use it well

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 고양이 환장해서 사냥 놀이 중
reviews.content_en: My cat is obsessed and playing hunting games with it 😸

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 낚시대에 걸어줄 장난감으로 샀습니다. 다 좋아해주길 바라면서...
reviews.content_en: I bought this as a toy to attach to the fishing rod. Hoping all my cats will like it... 🤞

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아무  낚시대에도 호환되고 좋아요.
은근 튼튼해서 꽤 오래갖고 놀 수 있고 구성이 괜찮네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's compatible with any fishing rod, which is nice. It's surprisingly sturdy so you can play with it for quite a while, and the set composition is solid ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
아직 안써봤어요
자주 바꿔주면서 놀아보겠습니다
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet. I'll play with it often by changing it out regularly.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 주인님이 잘 뛰어놀기를...
reviews.content_en: Hope the owner plays and runs around well with it...

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 아직 안써봤는데 깃털류 좋아하는 애기들이라면 완전 좋아할 것 같아요 .. 굿굿
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet, but I think cats that like feather toys will absolutely love this.. Good good!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 장난감리필용구매 고퀄입니다!! 세일할때 사세요~!!
reviews.content_en: Purchased refill pack - great quality!! Buy it when there's a sale~!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아이들이 정말 좋아합니다 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: The kids really love it ㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송이 매우 빠르고 품질도 아주 조아요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was very fast and the quality is really great too

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이거 아주 요긴합니다!! 낚싯대에 연결해서 사용하기도 하고 자동 장남감에 연결해 사용하기더 해요!!!
reviews.content_en: This is super handy!! I use it connected to a fishing rod and also attach it to automatic toys!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 리필팩이 있어 넘넘 좋아요...종류별로 골라 노는재미...집사도 만족 쥔님도 만족 입니다.
reviews.content_en: Having refill packs available is so so great... the fun of choosing different types... both the cat parent and the kitty are happy.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 좋아요 냥이가 너무 좋아해서 다행이에여 굿굿
reviews.content_en: It's great, so glad my kitty loves it so much! Good good!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 깃털, 작은벌레에 환장하는 냥님.. 박스에서 꺼내자마자 아주 난리가 났는데요 네... 30분 컷입니다 ㅠ 아주 깃털 다 뽑아놓고 방울만 덩그러니... 30분 잘 놀았으니 그걸로 만족 ㅠㅠ ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My cat is absolutely obsessed with feathers and tiny bugs... she went crazy the moment I took it out of the box. Yep... lasted 30 minutes 😅 She completely pulled out all the feathers and left just the bell dangling... but hey, she had a great 30-minute playtime so I'm satisfied 😭😭 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애기가 너무너무 좋아해요! 특히 갈색꼬리털 같은 장난감을 가장 좋아합니다!!🤎
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much! She especially loves the toy that looks like a brown tail!! 🤎

reviews.name: ㄷ****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아하네요 잘샀어요~
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much, great purchase! ~

reviews.name: ㄷ****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아하네요 잘샀어요
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much, great purchase!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 구성이 알차서 애들마다 선호하는걸 가지고 놀수있어 좋네요👍
reviews.content_en: The set is well-rounded so each of the kids can pick their favorite toy to play with, which is great! 👍

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 이미 다 물어 뜯김 ㅠㅠ 애가 너무 재미있게 놀긴했어요
reviews.content_en: She's already chewed everything up ㅠㅠ but she had so much fun playing with it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 이미 다 물어 뜯겼지만 재미있게 놀았음
reviews.content_en: She already chewed through everything, but she had a blast playing with it

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀아서 집사는 흐믓합니다
reviews.content_en: She plays with it so well and I'm just happy watching her 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 흥미를 보이는거 같아요 좋아요
reviews.content_en: She seems really interested in it, I love it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 고급지고 좋아요.잘쓸게요..
reviews.content_en: It's high quality and great. I'll use it well..

reviews.name: 행****
reviews.content: 잘 받았어요. 잘 쓸게요
reviews.content_en: Got it safely. I'll use it well!
